# Check if we have aarch64 addr2line, and try to download symbols from Microsoft symbol server
# The BuildId from the tombstone is: 1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"
FILE="libmonosgen-2.0.so"

# Try Microsoft symbol server - ELF debug info format
echo "=== Trying Microsoft symbol server ==="
# Format 1: elf-buildid-sym
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} - %{url_effective}\n" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${FILE}/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/${FILE}" 2>&1

# Format 2: elf-buildid (no -sym)
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} - %{url_effective}\n" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${FILE}/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/${FILE}" 2>&1

# Format 3: Try the _.debug variant
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} - %{url_effective}\n" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${FILE}.dbg/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/${FILE}.dbg" 2>&1

# Format 4: debuginfod
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} - %{url_effective}\n" \
